audio_description: The audio features a male voice shouting urgently, followed by a woman's scream, creating a tense and alarming atmosphere.
temporal_description: A man in a suit and tie is seen holding a walkie-talkie, standing in front of a wall covered with photographs. The scene shifts to a close-up of a hand sliding a card across a keyboard, revealing a yellow card with text. Another man wearing headphones is shown in a dimly lit room, focused on something out of frame. The scene transitions to a nighttime outdoor setting where a group of people in dark clothing are gathered around a car parked on a rocky hillside. They appear to be moving around the vehicle, with some individuals holding flashlights. One person is seen pulling a large black bag while walking through a smoky area near a boat.
